CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2005 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-02-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclaire.
Jeff Berger, Esq. for Petitioner: Warren Foster, present as Guardian at litem for: Genifer Foster, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
No fees or costs.
A net balance of $3,750.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with Smith Barney (Educational Account #576-OC142-10-026) 10 S. Wacker Drive, Suite 2800, Chicago 60606, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-07-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)
